Video.summary: Steve Ross paints a splashing waterfall.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Surprising Falls

Video.title: Natural Wonder

Video.summary: Bob paints a barn at a forest's edge.

Video.title: Grandpa's Barn

Video.summary: A lake gleams before a calm peak.

Video.title: Peaceful Reflections

Video.summary: Using only gray and white to paint a cabin amid frozen mountains.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Shades of Gray

Video.summary: Bob paints a lavender and green forest scene.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Misty Forest Oval

Video.summary: The fall breeze rustles in the trees and skips across crisp still waters.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Autumn Splendor

Video.summary: Sunlight warms a wintry landscape.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: On a Clear Day

Video.summary: As the night settles over a rocky coast, a warm glow of the ending day still sits in the sky.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Ebony Sea

Video.summary: Bob paints a colorful autumn scene.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Colors of Nature

Video.summary: A path meanders alongside a quiet river.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Riverside Escape Oval

Video.summary: The glistening sun peeks through the trees in this wintry scene; Bob Ross creates a cold day warmed by daystar radiance.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Winter Sun

Video.summary: A pond stagnates in a dank, dark forest.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
